runningPhilosophy: Running is my daily meditation. It is where complex scientific concepts fall into place, code logic errors make sense, and my brain resets. Whether it is a fast track workout or a long trail run, running keeps me grounded, disciplined, and connected to the natural world.

ascentRunClub.name: Ascent Run Club
ascentRunClub.tagline: A community of runners exploring trails, road runs, and the joy of consistency.
ascentRunClub.whyStarted: I founded Ascent Run Club in late 2024 to bring together students, academics, and locals who wanted a mental break from screens and studies. Running in a group builds unique friendships and keeps you accountable.
ascentRunClub.weeklyRuns: Wednesdays at 6:30 AM (Social 5K) & Saturdays at 6:00 AM (Long Trail Run)
